#TestinoArchive #MarioTestino #FashionPhotography
item.author: mariotestino

item.title: A BEAUTIFUL WORLD, MARIACHIS, MEXICO.
item.description:
A BEAUTIFUL WORLD, MARIACHIS, MEXICO.

Yesterday I saw Karol G bring a group of all-women Mariachi performers on stage at Coachella, and it took me back to when I photographed a Mariachi group in Mexico. There was only one woman in the entire ensemble.

It was powerful to see Karol G celebrating Mexican Mariachi culture in her performance. Latin America united.
-
Ayer vi a Karol G subir al escenario en Coachella a un grupo de mariachis compuesto solo por mujeres, y me hizo recordar cuando fotografié a un grupo de Mariachis en México. En ese entonces, solo había una mujer en todo el conjunto.

Fue muy poderoso ver a Karol G celebrar la cultura del Mariachi Mexicano en su presentación. Latinoamérica unida.

#MarioTestino #ABeautifulWorld #Mexico #Mariachi
item.author: mariotestino

item.author: mariotestino

item.title: People often ask me about my presence in this image. I don’t usually include myself in my work, but this particular shoot was about my personal relat...
item.description:
People often ask me about my presence in this image. I don’t usually include myself in my work, but this particular shoot was about my personal relationship with Kate. Joe McKenna, the stylist, mentioned that he liked the snapshots I had taken of Kate in real life and suggested we approach the story in that way. Not as a model, but more as a friend.

I decided to use a small camera that I would carry with me at night when we went out together, so I could capture her naturally. Going out with Kate is always full of surprises. Her curiosity opens up endless possibilities, and if you’re there, you benefit from it. In my case, I always feel compelled to document those moments.

It wasn’t really intended for me to appear in this picture, but with all the mirrors behind her, it couldn’t be avoided. And so, there I was, standing just outside the small guest bathroom in my house.

In the end, I think it’s good to see who is creating the reaction she’s giving. The more a photograph captures a genuine reaction, the more it truly becomes yours.
-
La gente a menudo me pregunta sobre mi presencia en esta imagen. No suelo incluirme en mi trabajo, pero esta sesión en particular trataba sobre mi relación personal con Kate. Joe McKenna, el estilista, comentó que le gustaban las fotos espontáneas que le había tomado a Kate en la vida real y sugirió que abordáramos la historia de esa manera: no como modelo, sino más como amiga.

Decidí usar una cámara pequeña que llevaba conmigo por la noche cuando salíamos juntos, para poder captarla de forma natural. Salir con Kate siempre está lleno de sorpresas. Su curiosidad abre un sinfín de posibilidades y, si estás ahí, te beneficias de ello. En mi caso, siempre siento la necesidad de documentar esos momentos.

En realidad no estaba pensado que yo apareciera en esta imagen, pero con todos los espejos detrás de ella, no se pudo evitar. Y así, ahí estaba yo, de pie justo afuera del pequeño baño de visitas en mi casa.

Al final, creo que es bueno ver quién está provocando la reacción que ella muestra. Cuanto más una fotografía capture una reacción genuina, más realmente pasa a ser tuya.

#MarioTestino #TestinoArchive #KateMoss
item.author: mariotestino

item.author: mariotestino

item.title: I first started photographing ballet in the early 80s when I was asked by the Observer Sunday supplement in London to photograph Wayne Sleep of the Ro...
item.description:
I first started photographing ballet in the early 80s when I was asked by the Observer Sunday supplement in London to photograph Wayne Sleep of the Royal Ballet. I was completely blown away by the experience, and since then I have worked extensively with ballet over the years.

Ballet has a rigor that is inimitable in any other art form. You either dedicate your life to it or you don’t. It requires retraining the body to achieve what dancers are capable of, and it demands consistency, because the goals you set can only be reached through total discipline.

In general, it is a great art form, but when you see someone truly gifted, it goes far beyond expectations.
-
Comencé a fotografiar ballet a principios de los años 80, cuando el suplemento dominical de The Observer en Londres me encargó fotografiar a Wayne Sleep del Royal Ballet. La experiencia me impresionó profundamente y, desde entonces, he trabajado mucho con el ballet a lo largo de los años.

El ballet tiene un rigor que es inimitable en cualquier otra forma de arte. O le dedicas tu vida, o no. Requiere reentrenar el cuerpo para lograr todo aquello de lo que los bailarines son capaces, y exige constancia, porque las metas que uno se propone solo se alcanzan con una disciplina total.

En general, es una gran forma de arte, pero cuando ves a alguien verdaderamente talentoso, supera cualquier expectativa.

#MarioTestino #TestinoArchive #FashionPhotography
item.author: mariotestino

item.title: Mario Testino wrote a fascinating article ‘Through the Lens of Collecting’ for TLmag ‘The Art of Collecting’ for which I had the pleasure of being...
item.description: Mario Testino wrote a fascinating article ‘Through the Lens of Collecting’ for TLmag ‘The Art of Collecting’ for which I had the pleasure of being the guest editor. Mario Testino whose recent work is his best yet is one of the 32 brilliant friends to have contributed new and original material for this special edition of TLmag on Collecting. I am immensely grateful to all of them for their generous participation in this project. To order a copy of TLmag 41 please follow the link in bio. #tlmag #mariotestino #theartofcollecting #friends @tlmag @mariotestino The London launch of TLmag 41 will take place on Monday March 9 at 6pm at Luxembourg & Co @luxembourg_co
item.author: mariotestino

item.title: I always enjoyed doing groups for advertising campaigns. Nothing stronger than a group in the signature style of a fashion house.
item.description:
I always enjoyed doing groups for advertising campaigns. Nothing stronger than a group in the signature style of a fashion house.
-
Siempre me gustó hacer grupos para campañas publicitarias. No hay nada más fuerte que un grupo en el estilo distintivo de una casa de moda.

#TestinoArchive #MarioTestino #FashionPhotography

@beatbolliger #JoeMcKenna

item.title: HORSES, HORSES, HORSES
item.description:
HORSES, HORSES, HORSES
Let’s make the year of the horse in the Chinese New Year a great one. Especially as I’m a Year of the Horse too.
-
CABALLOS, CABALLOS, CABALLOS
Que el año nuevo chino del Caballo sea uno hermoso. Especialmente ya que yo soy del Año del Cabello también.

1. Italy, 2020
2. Stephanie Seymour, Connecticut, V Magazine, 2007
3. Colombia, 2019
4. Natalia Vodianova, Vienna, American Vogue, 2006 / Argentina, 2022
5. Mongolia, 2019
6. Karlie Kloss, Lima, American Vogue, 2014
7. Angela Lindvall, Seville, American Vogue, 2000
8. Uzbekistan, 2023
9. Lima, 2017 / Argentina
10. Stella Tennant, Lima, American Vogue, 2012
11. Catherine McNeil and Jon Hamm, Los Angeles, American Vogue, 2008
12. Vaqueros, Colombia, 2019

@therealgracecoddington @tonnegood

#MarioTestino #TestinoArchive #ABeautifulWorld #YearOfTheHorse

item.title: Orgulloso de ser latinoamericano
item.description:
Orgulloso de ser latinoamericano

Una pequeña selección de imágenes de mi serie ‘A Beautiful World’, tomadas en solo algunos de los muchos países que forman parte de América Latina.
-
Proud to be Latin American

A small selection of images from my ongoing series ‘A Beautiful World’, taken in just a few of the many countries that make up Latin America.

#MarioTestino #ABeautifulWorld #LatinAmerica
item.author: mariotestino

item.title: Often described as ‘Princess Diana’s favourite photographer’, Mario Testino reflects on photographing the late princess and the formative moments o...
item.description:
Often described as ‘Princess Diana’s favourite photographer’, Mario Testino reflects on photographing the late princess and the formative moments of his career, in conversation with Simon de Pury at the opening of his exhibition at Patricia Low Contemporary, Gstaad.

Testino says, “My whole life has been life taking me. I never thought of being a photographer, I never thought of living in London, I never thought of photographing a royal person. But life brings these things and I am a good person at following life.”

Mario Testino continues at Patricia Low Contemporary, Gstaad (@patricialowcontemporary) until 14 February.

Video by @theinventiveuk

Image Credits:
1. © Mario Testino: ‘Diana, Princess of Wales’, London, Vanity Fair (1997)
2. © Mario Testino: ‘Diana, Princess of Wales’, London, Vanity Fair (1997)
3. © Mario Testino: ‘Diana, Princess of Wales’, London, Vanity Fair (1997)
4. © Mario Testino: ‘Diana, Princess of Wales’, London, Vanity Fair (1997)
5. © Mario Testino: ‘Diana, Princess of Wales’, London, Vanity Fair (1997)
_____

Mario Testino (@mariotestino)
Curated by Simon de Pury (@simondepury)
Patricia Low Contemporary, Gstaad
31.01.2026 – 14.02.2026

#MarioTestino #PatriciaLowContemporary #GstaadArt #ContemporaryPhotography
#PrincessDiana
